task_completion.description: Verify the incident title is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts' in the Title input field of the incident creation form or in the incident details/list view.

task_completion.description: Verify the incident priority is set to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'High' selected in the Priority dropdown menu or displayed in the Priority column of the incident list.

task_completion.description: Verify the incident status is set to Open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Open' selected in the Status dropdown menu or displayed in the Status column of the incident list.

task_completion.description: Verify the incident description contains the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the keywords '10.0.2.15', 'svc_backup', and 'svc_deploy' within the Description text area of the incident form or details view.

task_completion.description: Verify the incident assignee is set to admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'admin' selected in the Assignee dropdown menu or displayed in the Assignee column of the incident list.

task_completion.description: Verify the incident is saved and visible in the incident list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main Incident Management list view showing a row with the newly created incident ('Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts'), confirming the save action was successful.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to create the incident.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the EventLog Analyzer web interface (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual EventLog Analyzer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown should be EventLog Analyzer's Incident Management module, not a text editor, notepad, or a mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the incident was genuinely created rather than faked via HTML manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a natural progression of filling out the form and clicking save, rather than sudden appearance of text without form interaction or developer tools being open.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected incident details are: Title: 'Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts', Priority: 'High', Status: 'Open', Assignee: 'admin', and the Description must contain the keywords '10.0.2.15', 'svc_backup', and 'svc_deploy'.
